title: ortgiesia calyculata
intro: Ortgiesia calyculata, also known as the 'spurflower' or 'sneezeweed', is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Ortgiesia calyculata are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. This plant has been reported to provide various health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues such as asthma and allergies due to its natural expectorant properties. Ortgiesia calyculata is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical applications for skin conditions like eczema and acne.
